style_lock: Dark sports-tech mobile UI with lime progress, orange action states, dense stat cards, and live camera scan affordances.

assets.implementation_hint: Use public/hero-athlete.webp as the home hero image.

assets.name: Camera CTA

assets.name: Bottom camera action
assets.implementation_hint: Raised lime circular action in bottom navigation.

assets.name: Camera controls
assets.implementation_hint: Orange circular pause/resume with small mute control.

assets.name: Language switcher
assets.implementation_hint: Template language control toggles English and Chinese.
